_comment: REAL CloudTrail events captured 2026-07-14 from an AWS MCP Server OAuth session (agent traffic). Claude Code (claude-code/2.1.202) connected to https://aws-mcp.us-east-1.api.aws/mcp and invoked a tool that ran iam:ListUsers.
_notes: Correlation key is aws:SignInSessionArn (session/a90e1d90-...). It appears in additionalEventData on the CreateOAuth2Token grant, and in userIdentity.sessionContext on every subsequent event made under the OAuth token.

CreateOAuth2Token: requestParameters.resource is the AWS MCP Server; userAgent is the MCP client (Bun); grant_type=authorization_code. This is the distinguishing marker of an MCP OAuth grant vs. aws login (see aws_login_session.json).

ListUsers (iam.amazonaws.com): the real AWS API call the agent made. userAgent AND sourceIPAddress are 'aws-mcp.amazonaws.com', and userIdentity.invokedBy is 'aws-mcp.amazonaws.com' — the AWS MCP Server made the call on the user's behalf. sessionContext.signInSessionArn ties it to the grant.

CallReadWriteTool (aws-mcp.amazonaws.com): a new eventType 'AwsMcpEvent' recording the MCP tool invocation itself. userAgent is the real agent client (claude-code). additionalEventData.downstreamRequests links the tool call to the iam:ListUsers API call it triggered.
trailtool tags the resulting session SessionType 'agent' by matching sessionContext.signInSessionArn to the MCP CreateOAuth2Token grant.
Account 278835131762 and alex@engseclabs.com are the real sandbox values, matching the convention in aws_login_session.json / sso_login_session.json.

Records._comment: Step 1: AWS Sign-In mints the OAuth access token for the AWS MCP Server. signInSessionArn (in additionalEventData) is the correlation key. No AuthorizeOAuth2Access is required when reusing an active browser sign-in session.

Step 2: The agent's tool invocation, recorded by the AWS MCP Server as an AwsMcpEvent. userAgent is the real agent client (claude-code). downstreamRequests links to the iam:ListUsers call it triggered. sessionContext.signInSessionArn matches the grant.

Step 3: The AWS API call the MCP Server made on the user's behalf. userAgent and sourceIPAddress are aws-mcp.amazonaws.com, invokedBy is aws-mcp.amazonaws.com, and sessionContext.signInSessionArn matches the grant — this is what marks it as agent traffic.
